name: ZXSnake
description: ZXSnake is a modern take on the classic Snake arcade game, featuring responsive controls, score chasing, achievements, multiplayer, and visuals inspired by the golden age of home computing.

name: ZXBrick
description: ZXBrick is a retro-inspired brick-breaking arcade game featuring handcrafted levels, power-ups, achievements, and fast-paced score-chasing gameplay.

name: ZXSpace
description: ZXSpace is a retro-inspired space shooter where fast reactions, enemy waves, power-ups, and high-score chasing combine to create a classic arcade experience.

name: ZXPong
description: ZXPong is a modern reimagining of the arcade classic, featuring quick rallies, AI opponents, multiplayer, achievements, and fast pick-up-and-play action.

name: GameOfDarts
description: Game Of Darts is a feature-rich darts scoring app for iPhone and iPad, with support for multiple game modes, player statistics, practice sessions, and local multiplayer.

name: StudioDash
description: StudioDash is an analytics and business intelligence platform preparing for private beta, bringing App Store Connect, Cloudflare, AdMob, AdSense, Google Search Console, GitHub, and other developer services together in one native workspace.
